experience.description: Building autonomous drone systems with ArduPilot and MAVLink, plus IoT prototypes with ESP32, STM32, sensors, and real-time hardware interfaces.
Built and maintain Code Janitor, a VS Code extension for autocorrect and syntax fixing across multiple programming languages. 1,500+ marketplace installs.
